results.title: Pravin Jadhav, Fintech Unicorn Founder, Says Bank Rejected His Home Loan Despite INR 1.2 Billion Valuation
results.description: Pravin Jadhav, founder and CEO of fintech unicorn Raise Financial Services, has sparked a discussion on startup founders' access to retail credit after revealing that a leading private bank rejected his home loan application, allegedly because he was classified as a 'high-risk' borrower due to being an entrepreneur.
